features.name: signed cast on concatenation with left shift
features.description: Code should include a signed cast applied to a concatenation result followed by a left shift, where the result width should extend beyond the original operand width

features.name: left shift result width not extended on signed operand
features.description: Code should include a left shift operation on a signed value where the result width should extend beyond the operand width, with the shift producing more significant bits beyond the original width
features.snippet:
logic signed [8:0] s = 9'b001110000;
logic signed [11:0] r = s << 3;
